topic.constraint: Validated performance under expected production traffic patterns.
topic.pattern: Auto-scaling, load balancing, and multi-region deployment configured.
topic.metric: Response times, accuracy, and consistency tested at production scale.
topic.constraint: Versioning, error handling, rate limiting, and documentation complete.
topic.metric: All enterprise system connections validated and documented.

topic.pattern: Technical metrics, business KPIs, and alerting configured.
topic.constraint: Authentication, encryption, access controls, and audit logging active.
topic.metric: Disaster recovery procedures validated and documented.
topic.constraint: Runbooks, escalation paths, and communication protocols established.
topic.metric: Budget controls, usage tracking, and optimization processes implemented.

topic.pattern: AI Center of Excellence and model governance committee operational.
topic.constraint: User training, technical documentation, and support processes ready.
topic.metric: Stakeholder buy-in, communication plan, and adoption strategy accepted.
topic.constraint: Legal review, regulatory requirements, and audit trails verified.
topic.metric: Business value indicators, ROI measurement, and reporting mechanisms active.

topic.pattern: Content structure, formatting, and semantic coverage enhanced.
topic.constraint: Production-ready embedding pipeline and retrieval architecture deployed.
topic.metric: Content accuracy, coverage, and update processes verified.
topic.constraint: Query optimization, caching strategies, and response quality tested.
